# Halo Air Heating & Cooling Ltd.

> Edmonton-based heating, cooling, plumbing and gas specialists. Family-run, fully licensed in Alberta. AC repair, furnace service, water heater service, maintenance, and after-hours service across Edmonton + Sherwood Park, St. Albert, Spruce Grove, Stony Plain, Leduc, Beaumont, Fort Saskatchewan.

Halo Air Heating & Cooling Ltd. is a licensed and insured HVAC contractor serving the Edmonton metro area in Alberta, Canada. Four trades under one roof — Red Seal Journeyman Plumber, Journeyman Gasfitter, Refrigeration Mechanic, and Air Conditioning Mechanic. Tagline: "Next-level Comfort". Award-winning HVAC technician with 15 years of industry experience.

## Contact

- Phone: 780-224-0024 (call or text)
- Email: haloairhvac@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8am–5pm. Weekends closed.
- After-hours: Available on request — call or email
- Service area: Edmonton + surrounding (8 cities, listed below) — service-area only, home office address not publicly listed
- Currency: CAD
- Payment: Cash, credit card, debit, e-Transfer

## Services

<!-- TODO: replace example.com with production domain at deploy time -->

### Heating ([category landing](https://example.com/services/heating/))
- [Furnace Repair](https://example.com/services/heating/furnace-repair/): Same-week diagnosis and repair for residential furnaces — all major brands, written quote before any work.
- [Furnace Installation](https://example.com/services/heating/furnace-installation/): High-efficiency furnace replacement, Manual J load calc, federal/provincial rebate paperwork handled.
- [Furnace Maintenance](https://example.com/services/heating/furnace-maintenance/): Annual fall 23-point tune-up — preserves manufacturer warranty, prevents winter breakdowns.

### Cooling ([category landing](https://example.com/services/cooling/))
- [AC Repair](https://example.com/services/cooling/ac-repair/): Fast diagnosis and repair for residential and light-commercial cooling. Refrigerant-licensed (R-410A, R-32).
- [AC Installation](https://example.com/services/cooling/ac-installation/): New central AC installs sized to your home. Free estimate, combined furnace + AC pricing available.
- [AC Maintenance](https://example.com/services/cooling/ac-maintenance/): Spring 18-point AC tune-up — coil cleaning, refrigerant pressure check, condition report.

### Water Heaters ([category landing](https://example.com/services/water/))
- [Water Heater Repair](https://example.com/services/water/water-heater-repair/): Tank and tankless repair — leaks, no hot water, lukewarm output, error codes. Priority dispatch on active leaks.
- [Water Heater Installation](https://example.com/services/water/water-heater-installation/): New tank installation, current Alberta code (expansion tank, T&P discharge, seismic strap). Red Seal Plumber + Gasfitter on every job.
- [Tankless Water Heaters](https://example.com/services/water/tankless-water-heaters/): On-demand water heater installation and service — Navien, Rinnai, Noritz, Bosch, A.O. Smith.

### Standalone
- [After-Hours Service](https://example.com/services/after-hours/): After-hours response for no-heat, no-cool, gas leaks, and burst-pipe situations. Call or email and we'll work to get to you as soon as possible.

## Service Areas

- [Edmonton](https://example.com/service-areas/edmonton/)
- [Sherwood Park](https://example.com/service-areas/sherwood-park/)

## Booking & quotes

To book a service visit or request a quote, use the online booking form at https://example.com/book/ or call 780-224-0024. Online requests are confirmed within one business day. After-hours service is available on request — call or email.

## Certifications

- Red Seal Journeyman Plumber
- Journeyman Gasfitter
- Refrigeration Mechanic
- Air Conditioning Mechanic

Award-winning HVAC technician with 15 years of industry experience. All work fully insured. Free written estimates on new equipment installs. Upfront pricing before any work begins.
